summary: Tested 8-pillar Soul Celebration grid with PillarSoulModal feature. Backend: 12/12 tests PASS. Frontend: All 5 pillar tests PASS. New API endpoint PATCH /api/pets/{pet_id}/pillar-soul-update working correctly. Master Sync confirmed with 379 celebrate products in system.

verified_features.8_pillar_grid: ✅ PASS - All 8 pillars (food, play, social, adventure, grooming, learning, health, memory) visible with GLOW state badges
verified_features.pillar_expansion: ✅ PASS - Food, Social, Health, Memory pillars all expand correctly with Close button
verified_features.feast_menu_card: ✅ PASS - Food pillar shows FeastMenuCard with birthday feast items
verified_features.pawty_planner_card: ✅ PASS - Social pillar shows PawtyPlannerCard with step buttons and Bruno/Cookie invited
verified_features.memory_invitation_card: ✅ PASS - Memory pillar shows MemoryInvitationCard with Book Photoshoot CTA
verified_features.pillar_soul_update_api: ✅ PASS - PATCH /api/pets/{pet_id}/pillar-soul-update updates soul answers, recalculates score, adds learned_facts
verified_features.products_api: ✅ PASS - GET /api/products?category=X returns products for all pillar tabs
verified_features.concierge_pillar_request_api: ✅ PASS - POST /api/concierge/pillar-request works for special panel actions
verified_features.master_sync: ✅ PASS - 379 celebrate products seeded in system

test_credentials: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 (pet: Mojo with 100% soul score)
seed_data_creation: Updated Mojo's doggy_soul_answers with food pillar test data (favorite_treats, birthday_feast_style)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8-pillar Soul Celebration features working. PillarSoulModal component ready for testing with INCOMPLETE state pillars (requires pet with missing soul data). URL: /celebrate-soul. Key APIs: PATCH /api/pets/{pet_id}/pillar-soul-update, GET /api/products?category=X. All special panel cards (FeastMenuCard, PawtyPlannerCard, WellnessHeroCard, MemoryInvitationCard) verified. Master Sync seeded 379 celebrate products.
